info.title: FarmFlow
info.description: FarmFlow backend API for farm management, IoT data, reports, and business dashboard.

tags.name: Assessments

get.description: Redirects the user to the selected SSO provider (Google or LINE) to begin the OAuth authorization flow.
Handles the OAuth callback. Existing SSO users are signed in; new SSO users are auto-provisioned an account. Returns an access token and the user profile.

schema.description: Authentication successful - returns an access token and the user profile

anyOf.description: Opaque refresh token; store securely on-device
Id of the device registered for this session, if any

post.description:
Creates a **draft** farm from the registration form — step 1 of farm setup. The boundary, check-in point, cover photo, and agricultural data are added afterwards via the other endpoints.

**Required:** farmName. **Optional:** farmAddress, declaredAreaRai (the area the farmer claims, in Rai; later compared against the PostGIS-computed area).

**Side effects:** inserts one farm owned by the caller, with farmStatus = "draft" and no geometry. The response's agriculturalData is always null at this stage.

**Business rules:** the farm is owned by the authenticated user; ownership is enforced on every later read and write.

**Errors:** **401 UNAUTHORIZED** (missing/invalid token) · **422 VALIDATION_ERROR** (empty farmName, negative declaredAreaRai).

declaredAreaRai.description: Area declared by the farmer, in Rai
Area declared by the farmer, in Rai
Area declared by the farmer, in Rai

get.description:
Returns the authenticated user's farms, newest first, **without** geometry or agricultural data — a lightweight list view. Use **GET /farms/:id** for the full record.

**Visibility:** soft-deleted farms are excluded.

**Errors:** **401 UNAUTHORIZED** (missing/invalid token).

schema.description: The requester's farms

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid access token.

schema.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid access token.

get.description:
Returns one owned farm in full: scalar fields, the boundary and check-in point as GeoJSON, and the agricultural data (species / planting year / density) read from the farm's default subplot.

**Response fields of note:** calculatedAreaRai (PostGIS area of the boundary in Rai — null until a boundary is saved) · areaDiscrepancyFlag (DB-derived: true when declared vs calculated area diverge by >15%) · overlapValidationFlag (reserved; always false in this release) · farmBoundary / checkinLocation (GeoJSON, null until set) · agriculturalData (null until recorded).

**Business rules:** only the owner can read the farm; a soft-deleted farm returns 404.

**Errors:** **401 UNAUTHORIZED** · **404 NOT_FOUND** (does not exist, not owned, or soft-deleted).

schema.description: Farm id (cuid2)

200.description: A single farm with boundary, check-in, and agricultural data

schema.description: A single farm with boundary, check-in, and agricultural data

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid access token.

schema.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid access token.

404.description: Not found - the farm does not exist or is not owned by the requester.

schema.description: Not found - the farm does not exist or is not owned by the requester.

patch.description:
Updates any subset of the editable farm fields — send only what you want to change.

**Editable:** farmName, farmAddress, declaredAreaRai, farmBoundary (GeoJSON Polygon/MultiPolygon), checkinLocation (GeoJSON Point).

**Side effects:** saving farmBoundary normalizes it to a MultiPolygon and recomputes calculatedAreaRai from the geometry (geom::geography ÷ 1600); areaDiscrepancyFlag is then re-derived by the DB. There is **no clear-to-null** here — sending a value replaces it; omit a field to leave it unchanged.

**Business rules:** owner-scoped; soft-deleted farms 404. An empty body (no recognized fields) is rejected, not silently accepted.

**Errors:** **400 BAD_REQUEST** (empty patch — "No fields to update") · **401 UNAUTHORIZED** · **404 NOT_FOUND** · **422 VALIDATION_ERROR** (malformed GeoJSON or bad types).

schema.description: Farm id (cuid2)

requestBody.description: Any subset of editable farm fields; boundary save recomputes the calculated area.

farmBoundary.description: Farm boundary as a GeoJSON Polygon or MultiPolygon; coordinates [lng, lat]

delete.description:
**Soft-deletes** an owned farm and cascades the soft-delete to its subplots, in one transaction (deletedAt stamped on both). The farm immediately disappears from **GET /farms**, **GET /farms/:id**, and — via the cascade — from the assessment-session reads for that farm.

**Deliberately retained:** the farm's assessment sessions, tree snapshots, and cover-photo file are **not** touched. T-VER compliance requires assessment data to survive farm deletion; it is hidden from the farmer, not destroyed.

**Idempotency:** deleting a farm that is already deleted (or not owned) returns **404** — a second delete is not a success.

**Errors:** **401 UNAUTHORIZED** · **404 NOT_FOUND** (missing, not owned, or already deleted).

schema.description: Farm id (cuid2)
Soft-delete confirmation

401.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid access token.

schema.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid access token.

404.description: Not found - the farm does not exist or is not owned by the requester.

schema.description: Not found - the farm does not exist or is not owned by the requester.

put.description:
Uploads a farm cover photo (multipart **file**) and links it to the farm, replacing any previous cover photo.

**Accepted:** JPEG / PNG / WebP / HEIC, max 10 MB.

**Side effects (one transaction, ADR 0002):** the new file is stored and the farm's coverPhotoFileId is repointed **before** the previous cover photo is purged — so the farm always references a real, existing file. Cover photos are **public**. The response is the new file's metadata.

**Business rules:** owner-scoped; soft-deleted farms 404.

**Errors:** **401 UNAUTHORIZED** · **404 NOT_FOUND** · **422 VALIDATION_ERROR** (missing file, wrong type, too large).

schema.description: Farm id (cuid2)
Uploaded cover photo metadata

schema.description: Unauthorized - missing or invalid access token.

schema.description: Not found - the farm does not exist or is not owned by the requester.

422.description: Validation error - the request failed schema validation.

schema.description: Validation error - the request failed schema validation.

put.description:
Upserts the farm's cultivation data (speciesId, plantingYear, treeDensityPerRai) with **PUT-replace** semantics — the whole record is replaced on each call.

**Where it's stored (ADR 0007):** the farm's single **default** (whole-farm) subplot — created on first save, updated thereafter. This is the cultivation unit an assessment session attaches to, so agricultural data must exist **before** a session can be started on the farm.

**Required:** speciesId (from **GET /species**). **Optional:** plantingYear, treeDensityPerRai.

**Concurrency:** a single atomic upsert — concurrent first-saves converge instead of racing into a duplicate-key error.

**Business rules:** owner-scoped; soft-deleted farms 404. An unknown speciesId is a **400** (not 404), with details.field = "speciesId" so the client can highlight the input.

**Errors:** **400 BAD_REQUEST** (unknown species) · **401 UNAUTHORIZED** · **404 NOT_FOUND** (farm) · **422 VALIDATION_ERROR**.

schema.description: Farm id (cuid2)
The farm's agricultural data

post.description:
Opens an assessment session on an owned farm for capturing tree snapshots. The session attaches to the farm's **default subplot** (ADR 0007), so the farm's agricultural data must be recorded first.

The session is created online, so it is **born synced** (syncStatus = "synced") with aiBatchStatus = "waiting" and totalSnaps = 0. Its tree snapshots, by contrast, are captured offline and drained from the client's outbox — each upload is idempotent (ADR 0010).

**One open session per farm:** a farm may have only one open session (neither completed nor cancelled) at a time. If one is already open, this returns **409** with details.openSessionId pointing at it — the client should resume that session, or complete/cancel it to free the slot, rather than starting a new one. (The Flutter app resumes automatically, so the 409 is a backstop for races, stale clients, and direct API calls; it is also enforced by a DB unique index.)

**Errors:** **400 BAD_REQUEST** (no agricultural data recorded yet) · **401 UNAUTHORIZED** · **404 NOT_FOUND** (farm missing, not owned, or deleted) · **409 CONFLICT** (an open session already exists — see details.openSessionId) · **422 VALIDATION_ERROR**.

get.description:
Returns the requester's assessment sessions, newest first. Filter to one farm with **?farmId**.

**Visibility:** sessions belonging to a soft-deleted farm (or subplot) are excluded — deleting a farm hides its sessions from the farmer, though the rows are retained for compliance.

**Errors:** **401 UNAUTHORIZED**.

get.description:
Returns one owned session, with farmId derived from its subplot (ADR 0007).

**Business rules:** owner-scoped; a session whose farm has been soft-deleted returns **404** (hidden from the farmer, retained in the DB).

**Errors:** **401 UNAUTHORIZED** · **404 NOT_FOUND**.

post.description:
Marks the session complete (stamps **completedAt**). **Idempotent** — re-completing returns the original completion time.

**Gate:** a session with **zero snapshots** cannot be completed (**400**) — capture at least one tree, or **cancel** the session instead. This mirrors the client's drain-gate (Complete is enabled only once the outbox is empty and at least one snapshot exists).

**Errors:** **400 BAD_REQUEST** (no snapshots) · **401 UNAUTHORIZED** · **404 NOT_FOUND** (missing, not owned, deleted farm, or cancelled).

post.description:
Uploads a geo-tagged tree photo (multipart) with measurements; the server derives **dbhCm** (= circumference ÷ π) and links the photo to the snapshot.

**Idempotency (required):** send an **Idempotency-Key** header — a stable UUID per captured tree, unchanged across retries. The offline client resends a capture after any transient/5xx error, so a response lost *after* the server already committed would otherwise create a duplicate tree. A repeated key returns the original snapshot unchanged — no duplicate row, no re-count — with an **Idempotent-Replay: true** response header. A missing key is **400**.

**Provenance (ADR 0010):** the capturing device is read from the session's access token (a deviceless session — e.g. SSO — cannot capture: **400**). Send **capturedAt** (ISO-8601) to record the true field-measurement time of an offline capture; it is stored as the snapshot's secure timestamp while **createdAt** stays the server receive time. capturedAt must not be in the future, nor precede the session start (**400**).

**Other rules:** the session must be open — adding to a **completed** session is **400**. Owner-scoped; a session whose farm was soft-deleted returns **404**.

**Errors:** **400 BAD_REQUEST** (missing Idempotency-Key · deviceless session · invalid/out-of-range capturedAt · completed session) · **401 UNAUTHORIZED** · **404 NOT_FOUND** (session missing, not owned, or deleted farm) · **422 VALIDATION_ERROR** (bad multipart field or capture location).

schema.description: Assessment session id (cuid2)

post.description:
Cancels (voids) an open session — the client's "abandon". The session is marked cancelled and **excluded** from the active pointer, lists, and dashboard counts, while its snapshots and photos are **retained** (T-VER evidence — hidden from the farmer, not deleted). Cancelling **frees the farm's one-open-session slot**, so a new session can start immediately.

**Business rules:** handles **empty and non-empty** sessions uniformly (supersedes the old empty-only discard). Owner-scoped; a session on a soft-deleted farm returns 404. A session that is already **completed** cannot be cancelled (**409**).

**Errors:** **401 UNAUTHORIZED** · **404 NOT_FOUND** (missing, not owned, deleted farm, or already cancelled) · **409 CONFLICT** (session already completed).

schema.description: Assessment session id (cuid2)
